mapper.sql: id, activity_id, student_id, type, status, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT si.chinese_name AS studentName, si.id AS studentId, si.student_no AS studentNo, asr.lenson_id AS matchedCourseId, sc.class_name as className, gg.grade_group_name AS gradeGroupName FROM sys_class sc LEFT JOIN student_info si ON sc.id = si.class_id LEFT JOIN grade_group gg ON sc.grade_group = gg.id LEFT JOIN activity_student_apply_report asar ON ( si.id = asar.student_id AND asar.activity_id = #{reqModel.activityId} AND asar.deleted = 0 ) LEFT JOIN activity_student_report asr ON ( si.id = asr.student_id AND asr.activity_id = #{reqModel.activityId} AND asr.deleted = 0 ) WHERE sc.school_id = #{schoolId} AND sc.department = #{department} AND sc.sid = #{schoolYear} AND sc.deleted = 0 AND si.deleted = 0 AND ( -- 二次报名的学生 asar.type = 2 OR -- 没有二次报名但是他没有匹配上课程的学生 (asar.type is null AND asr.id IS NULL) )
AND sc.id = #{reqModel.classId}
AND si.chinese_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{reqModel.studentName}, '%')
AND si.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{reqModel.studentNo}, '%')
-- 匹配成功：有匹配课程 AND asr.id IS NOT NULL
-- 匹配失败：没有匹配课程 AND asr.id IS NULL
ORDER BY si.id
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT asar.student_id) FROM activity_student_apply_report asar WHERE asar.activity_id = #{activityId} AND asar.type = 2 AND asar.deleted = 0

SELECT avl.id, avl.activity_id, avl.apply_id, avl.student_id, avl.lenson_id, avl.volunteer_type, avl.create_time, avl.update_time, avl.deleted FROM ( -- 获取每个学生最新的报名记录ID SELECT student_id, MAX(id) as latest_apply_id FROM activity_student_apply_report WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND type = #{applyType} AND status != 2 AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY student_id) latest_apply left join activity_volunteer_lenson avl ON avl.apply_id = latest_apply.latest_apply_id WHERE avl.activity_id = #{activityId} AND avl.deleted = 0 ORDER BY avl.student_id, avl.volunteer_type

SELECT stu.id AS studentId, grade.grade_group_name AS gradeGroupName, cla.class_name AS className, stu.seat_no AS seatNo, stu.chinese_name AS studentName, stu.student_no AS studentNo FROM sys_class cla INNER JOIN student_info stu ON cla.id = stu.class_id LEFT JOIN grade_group grade ON cla.grade_group = grade.id LEFT JOIN activity_student_apply_report asar ON (stu.id = asar.student_id AND asar.deleted = 0 AND asar.activity_id = #{reqModel.activityId}) LEFT JOIN activity_student_report asr ON (stu.id = asr.student_id AND asr.activity_id = #{reqModel.activityId} AND asr.type = 1 AND asr.deleted = 0) WHERE cla.deleted = 0 AND stu.deleted = 0 AND cla.school_id = #{schoolId} AND cla.sid = #{schoolYear} AND cla.department = #{department} AND asr.id IS NULL
AND cla.id = #{reqModel.classId}
AND stu.chinese_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{reqModel.studentName}, '%')
AND stu.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{reqModel.studentNo}, '%')
AND stu.class_id IN
#{item}
GROUP BY stu.id HAVING COUNT(asar.id) = 0 ORDER BY CASE grade.grade WHEN '中六' THEN 1 WHEN '中五' THEN 2 WHEN '中四' THEN 3 WHEN '中三' THEN 4 WHEN '中二' THEN 5 WHEN '中一' THEN 6 WHEN '六年級' THEN 7 WHEN '五年級' THEN 8 WHEN '四年級' THEN 9 WHEN '三年級' THEN 10 WHEN '二年級' THEN 11 WHEN '一年級' THEN 12 WHEN '幼三' THEN 13 WHEN '幼二' THEN 14 WHEN '幼一' THEN 15 ELSE 999 END ASC, cla.class_serial_number DESC, stu.seat_no IS NULL, stu.seat_no ASC
